resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-research-recommendations
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool analyst recommendations
resourceTemplates.description: Returns analyst recommendation trends for a company ticker, including strong buy, buy, hold, sell, strong sell counts and consensus price targets.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-research-company-news
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool company news
resourceTemplates.description: Returns recent news articles mentioning a specific company ticker, including headline, summary, source, URL and publication timestamp.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-research-press-releases
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool company press releases
resourceTemplates.description: Returns official company press releases for a ticker symbol, including title, content and publication time.
